calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Prove Up Hearing; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Counsel For Plaintiff In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Tony Chen.
Dept. 514. Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Vicki Gross, CSR #5525. Telephone: 415-551-3730. Email: vgross@sftc.org.

West Imoben, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A.
Clifton Inohara, Litigation Specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Tony Chen.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book/Common Counts was filed on October 19, 2018 and personally served on defendant Tony Chen on January 26, 2019.
Default as to defendant Tony Chen was entered on June 14, 2019.
Plaintiff's complaint did not name any DOE defendants.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Capital One Bank (USA), N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Tony Chen, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $47,506.95.
Costs - $522.00.

Total - $48,028.95.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
